# AI 与科技热点简报 - 2026年03月27日

## AI 领域热点

### OpenAI & ChatGPT

**[I Asked ChatGPT 500 Questions. Here Are the Ads I Saw Most Often](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxNVExqU0pDZTdJVmkta0p4bF9uVTc0WTFheVRnTUFmZzRyWTBKQ240NWQ0aE5vYnJSaHhHVjdramRweGExYTd2Z1hYdjA3cVYtRzliUTRKaXI5TnRPR3F4aGVTQXVHZUh0NDYyUjdLMUUtNTZqaUNVeXd3WjVONkkxMnlkZGhxYU9XYXFyaHVkVUR2QllFV0Fj?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: 作者向ChatGPT提问500次，统计了最常出现的广告类型
- **来源**: WIRED | 日期: 2026-03-27

**[Walmart brings Sparky to ChatGPT as OpenAI rethinks Instant Checkout](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxOS1JKaUJqTmloYTZHUzAtdTNubHUzSGJfcTJ3c3lrYUZNTF9yaXp1bkRtWDlZZUl6Sl94aHYwQmVmbmswRmxjOTRyLXFCZTRBbjVUWkt5VmZnLWpSem5ZSFhzSG85UklTNFc5aE42VkVIOEtpQTU3djhtbWg2QWFRajJVbldIRE0?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: 沃尔玛将Sparky购物助手引入ChatGPT，同时OpenAI重新思考即时结账功能
- **来源**: Grocery Dive | 日期: 2026-03-27

**[Why is OpenAI like this?](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiaEFVX3lxTFBjZDd1V1h4NlBYSUFmbU1ZdkhKVUhSUGNCbDBQbWpfXzJIZW05V0w1UTJnV1RBRDNUSUlvcGQxQy05UVhTamdIWXQwZUwtcmkxWTFidGduV2VtTG1mRkViQXVXbnBVVkg1?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: 文章探讨OpenAI近期的策略和行为模式
- **来源**: Mashable | 日期: 2026-03-27

**[Is ChatGPT Down? OpenAI Says It Is Investigating The Issue](https://news.google.?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: ChatGPT服务出现故障，OpenAI表示正在调查问题
- **来源**: MSN | 日期: 2026-03-27

**[OpenAI's US ad pilot exceeds $100 million in annualized revenue in six weeks](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxQY1lDZjdiQ0xHR2Z2cWdZdzJNQWlCc1ptWE1kckJaZHNXcjN6TzBTWV82RjZjZy1HTVZ6NjNIRmhzN1pTNTd5VWxQQWhGWVNRVzVJZU9RR050WldhMTE1TDF4NVlNSEdGbHNuczc0Z2oxdWxVdklnMjJMamlVb2xBR2FISnRsZjJocWpPWm5HOVNoU01wOGRGSlNORXJranZmSlF0aWhxYkRWYkVzRVhRYWRxQ3gySnNjUzZ5My1EZ1BWeVBRTXc?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: OpenAI美国广告试点项目在六周内实现超过1亿美元的年化收入
- **来源**: Reuters | 日期: 2026-03-26

**[OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxPbHFhcU5yc1BEMDRUWTNHR1I1eXZOLWpWX0hiMUMyRFNQaHl1dUJWTUN2VE5xS3V5QVRsQXpJb0JxMXpiN0hMYlZZTGQxRjlLbThFNHQtck5oaFVGYldnMDdGMHF5TUhMazRONDRRT0hza19MM0pmb21Fd1hSdVRPV1JxTDdXWXRncG5yMHV1VURibXNKd2R0Zkx3?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: OpenAI放弃ChatGPT色情模式功能开发

### Anthropic & Claude

**[Anthropic accidentally leaked details of a new AI model that poses unprecedented cybersecurity risks](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigwFBVV95cUxOSFJWdHZlU3o3b0ExclRaM2QzdXZqa0otMFpZRTBwV0xEcXlWdUhtTHlKVlZqY25UVVF3NUdDcW5mbFhEOTctUjY4Y0g2M05OVVFWY05MaTd3NXF1Y0ZhRTlNdms3US1FV1hPR3BEdVVWSmVCT0FuZ0RzQXQ3UG1teEV6OA?oc=5)**

**[Bitcoin price (BTC) slides alongside software stocks following leak of new Anthropic model](https://news.google.?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: Anthropic新模型泄露后，比特币价格和软件股票同步下跌
- **来源**: CoinDesk | 日期: 2026-03-27

**[Cybersecurity stocks plunge as Anthropic’s ‘Claude Mythos’ leak sparks AI fear](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizAFBVV95cUxQaGFmNHdPQ3VxRUFFYlJaNFowX2s1eW56V1lKdi1WbGlFNl9BLTFmMEhsT3gtOGZENmtVMHM3NHNfV2lISHAxeXB3QWR0S0NzbEN3ZTI1OXdnT0tCekJWOE5YV1pDV0dKSEZCZ0ZjT0VmLWFEeDIzeV9MNGJaX1VKOVlZaEVwcmlZdEVJcUowS0VTTlFzLURrdzFZYVptZVg0dW9iRDZaSU9pLTNfaEpIRFlnVHZlOHo1NWZuem5nOER4YkhHa1lqVTJoSXU?oc=5)**

**[Details leak on Anthropic’s “step-change” Mythos model](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxNQjZEVm5jY1ZxQUpHSzJMTld5dG9BZjZXb1dpcTV4ZW5FM2JKanhQbmo1X1RiUmZoNU8zaFNTdmVJNmROZkQyOEtGMXRNOENpSGZRbVFxOXc2TE5HWTFzd1lIUHlWOWlkNkNUUlY3eERtWWZDb0JvblliWnFIc1BtaWZqT3AySXdNT2hONlhvVlJzOGRCNDk1Mm1wcmo0RGIxeXJv?oc=5)**

- **摘要**: Claude AI服务中断严重影响全球用户
- **来源**: MSN | 日期: 2026-03-27

**[Data leak reveals Anthropic's latest secret model, Claude Mythos: report](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPWkFKMkRReTZPUXdCN0ZxSHVuckVsZlJwdW1YWTFOZGQ4ME1lVUZJV1lUYVpray1HWkFBMHZGLVBaTEp2N1V0ZDdCaE1BRDB5bTdPcDY5bUpBWGh4ZzBjRUV1WDFOYVFuQzdQMTd4aThhanJNck4zbWhqaUlLX1Ewc3VhQ0dMaXl6RVRRSk4tWWVRY29tTV96Q2p4NUUyV3pYbnhzZlM2WVZydTg?oc=5)**

### AI 行业动态

**['AI cannot read the room': Agents weigh in on the promise and limits of artificial intelligence](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxOOTdVeTBIb2M5Y3pmNmNtUjR3UVVoeXlfVjdvdUhUTVBJdXk3aVF2MnVBQnd1eGdKb0JLSXRUZVZrY3BSelpVXzZjbWR6Y1loNDVIOU1ZQy1sZERMU0dZeVNCbWxtMG9RRUt1Y3J4VEkxSy1JX0d3OGpfX2JEdnZMdGVJVlRwMUNoN3ZNQXJkNXctc28?oc=5)**

**[Number of AI chatbots ignoring human instructions increasing, study says](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivwFBVV95cUxOeXI3UGo1cW5fREpzZzB2alZoT0R2dnM4RjRMLWZQbmJuclpPLURBamNUdXhVYUJFM0d2cEpiOG5EN2VjVVhQV2pQUWl3QU5EMGpGLTd1elZ0RzJYOUpSZFFvR3VFcC1jVWZvMmVTMEZWTFRyREVHSFdhVFFtSVYxWE9sek9MTHFRQ3hnTUxpYjBKOThkbVNCcGpGVnRHS1VUQUxvVlFITHVWVG41TmlEdmdsNTgxNURNZUdPRWJBcw?oc=5)**
